summary: Installer progress now advances while ArcRho files are installed instead of staying at 10% through most of setup.
details: The Windows installer now uses NSIS's built-in file installation path for the single-architecture build so progress and file details update during the main install phase without opening a helper console window.
The install-page status text now follows the actual progress bar percentage while ArcRho files are being installed.
The installer details panel now stays enabled during file installation so users can see ongoing file-install activity instead of a static preparation message.
